name: Refuel AI
description: LLM-powered data labeling and enrichment platform with purpose-built Refuel-LLM and open-source Autolabel Python library.

seo.title: Refuel AI — AI API / SDK for Developers
seo.meta_description: Refuel AI: LLM-powered data labeling and enrichment platform with purpose-built Refuel-LLM and open-source Autolabel Python library.

when_to_use: Auto-labeling large datasets with LLM-assisted annotation
Reducing human labeling costs with confidence-filtered AI labels
Building active learning pipelines for data-efficient training
Programmatic labeling using natural language labeling functions

cons: Model still weaker than GPT-4 for edge tasks
Smaller ecosystem than Scale or Snorkel
review.verdict: Pragmatic for large, cheap automated labeling pipelines; human-in-the-loop remains necessary for the hardest cases.
review.best_for: ML teams labeling millions of rows where accuracy is flexible
review.not_for: High-stakes tasks needing expert human review

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Freemium with free tier; no peak-lock evidence
